summary: The user is working on their thesis, focusing on social media addiction and its effects on mental health in young adults. They are currently developing their methodology chapter and seeking advice on organizing research papers and optimizing their citation management using Mendeley.
facts: The user is working on their thesis and has been focusing on the methodology chapter for the past two weeks, hoping to finish it by the end of the month. The user is researching social media addiction and its effects on mental health specifically in young adults. The user has been using Mendeley as their citation manager and is looking to optimize their workflow. The user plans to create a thesis folder in Mendeley with subfolders for each chapter and use tags to categorize papers by theme and methodology. The user intends to prioritize papers using the star rating system and create a "must-read" list for critical papers. The user will take notes on each paper to engage with the content and identify connections between papers.
